TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == pintriqan Msbtunux ru Gogan 大嵙崁戰役 == ryax pinlahang 年代政權 西元1886～1892年. ki'an rhzyal . plaw mciriq Msbtunux,大嵙崁後山群Gogan,大豹群Mngciq,馬里闊丸群Mqwang. mrhuw tgleng 領導者 Msbtunux- Maray Yuri/ Qara- Yumin Botu/ Tkasan-Syat/ Pehu Sbunaw- Yukan Bulung/ Pyaway- Maray Smyaq/ Gogan- Yawi Nokan, Yumin Yaway, Temu Qawin, Yukan Taru, Maray Temu/ Bngciq-Iyaw Syat/ Tranan- Maray Watan 'ringan zyaw 事件起因 ptringan squ zyaw "pnayang rgyax ru mzimu tayal" na 劉銘傳 qani. nway nha khangan rhzyal qalang Msbtunux ru Gogan. qolay ta kwara pinbahuw knus nha ma. yasa stpinriqan nha ita Tayal Gogan ki Msbtunux. 1886 kawas 劉銘傳 tmu hetay mzyup rhzyal qalang Tayal Msbtunux ki Gogan. ryaxqani kinrngu ta qmhut mhtuy, t'aring squ 2~3 byacing na " pintriqan Snazi", 3~6 byacing na " pintriqan Tkasan" , 9~11 byacing " pintriqan Pyaway", 1887 kawas 8~10 byacing na " pintriqan Topa", 1888 kawas 5~6 byacing " pintriqan Sbunaw", 1889 kawas 9 byacing ~ 1890 kawas 1 byacing na " pintriqan Gogan yatux" , 1891 kawas 9 byacing~ 1892 kawas 4 byacing na " pintriqan qnhut Msbtunux ki Gogan". ita qutux llyung pinhaban Tayal mhtuy hetay ayung Theluw. kwara pintriqan qani wal ta nya slaqux squ patas ru smwal sbalay Tayal. ana ga, ini nha baqi qmroq ita Tayal M'gaga squ hogan ru pklahang kinbhgan nqu qyunam rhzyal Tayal. ",3~6月"Tkasan之役",9月~11月" ",1889年9月~1890年1月"Gogan M'gaga . zyaw pcingan 事件後影響 kahul sqani lga wahan tqnga binah squliq. qolan ta na rhzyal hogan ru pyaran ta musa tkhut tmwang qalang rgyax. ( yan, ngungu kli, Sankyo, Goryo, Kiyay, Matuy rhzyal hogan qani wal nha qolan. tayal Bngciq mgyay tmwang lingay Yawhbun ru Silung). bsyaq mkbbaq binah ssquliq lga, pzyux qu pkalan ru pkatan uzi. skahul squ p'izyuw qqaya yasa sqyanux na saxa nha. maki qutux ke krryax ta sraral muci, " iyat t'gryung laqi squliq hiya. ke qani ga yasa balay nyux smyuk qnxan nasa. ,Bngciq .
S.PHON: == pintriqan ms~ɕβtunux ru ɣoɣan ***** == rjax pinlaħaŋ **** ************. kiʔan rħzjal . plaw mʦ~ʨiriq ms~ɕβtunux,******ɣoɣan,***mŋʦ~ʨiq,*****mqwaŋ. mrħuw tɣleŋ *** ms~ɕβtunux- maraj juri/ qara- jumin βotu/ tkas~ɕan-s~ɕjat/ peħu s~ɕβunaw- jukan βuluŋ/ pjawaj- maraj s~ɕmjaq/ ɣoɣan- jawi nokan, jumin jawaj, temu qawin, jukan taru, maraj temu/ βŋʦ~ʨiq-ijaw s~ɕjat/ tranan- maraj watan ʔriŋan zjaw **** ptriŋan s~ɕqu zjaw "pnajaŋ rɣjax ru mzimu tajal" na *** qani. nwaj nħa kħaŋan rħzjal qalaŋ ms~ɕβtunux ru ɣoɣan. qolaj ta kwara pinβaħuw knus~ɕ nħa ma. jas~ɕa s~ɕtpinriqan nħa ita tajal ɣoɣan ki ms~ɕβtunux. **** kawas~ɕ *** tmu ħetaj mzjup rħzjal qalaŋ tajal ms~ɕβtunux ki ɣoɣan. rjaxqani kinrŋu ta qmħut mħtuj, tʔariŋ s~ɕqu *~* βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na " pintriqan s~ɕnazi", *~* βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na " pintriqan tkas~ɕan" , *~** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ " pintriqan pjawaj", **** kawas~ɕ *~** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na " pintriqan topa", **** kawas~ɕ *~* βjaʦ~ʨiŋ " pintriqan s~ɕβunaw", **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ~ **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na " pintriqan ɣoɣan jatux" , **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ~ **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na " pintriqan qnħut ms~ɕβtunux ki ɣoɣan". ita qutux lljuŋ pinħaβan tajal mħtuj ħetaj ajuŋ tħeluw. kwara pintriqan qani wal ta nja s~ɕlaqux s~ɕqu patas~ɕ ru s~ɕmwal s~ɕβalaj tajal. ana ɣa, ini nħa βaqi qmroq ita tajal mʔɣaɣa s~ɕqu ħoɣan ru pklaħaŋ kinβħɣan nqu qjunam rħzjal tajal. ",*~**"tkas~ɕan**",**~***" ",*******~*******"ɣoɣan mʔɣaɣa . zjaw pʦ~ʨiŋan ***** kaħul s~ɕqani lɣa waħan tqŋa βinaħ s~ɕquliq. qolan ta na rħzjal ħoɣan ru pjaran ta mus~ɕa tkħut tmwaŋ qalaŋ rɣjax. ( jan, ŋuŋu kli, s~ɕankjo, ɣorjo, kijaj, matuj rħzjal ħoɣan qani wal nħa qolan. tajal βŋʦ~ʨiq mɣjaj tmwaŋ liŋaj jawħβun ru s~ɕiluŋ). βs~ɕjaq mkββaq βinaħ s~ɕs~ɕquliq lɣa, pzjux qu pkalan ru pkatan uzi. s~ɕkaħul s~ɕqu pʔizjuw qqaja jas~ɕa s~ɕqjanux na s~ɕaxa nħa. maki qutux ke krrjax ta s~ɕraral muʦ~ʨi, " ijat tʔɣrjuŋ laqi s~ɕquliq ħija. ke qani ɣa jas~ɕa βalaj njux s~ɕmjuk qnxan nas~ɕa. ,βŋʦ~ʨiq .
S.FORM: == pintriqan Msbtunux ru Gogan 大嵙崁戰役 == ryax pinlahang 年代政權 西元1886～1892年. ki'an rhzyal . plaw mciriq Msbtunux,大嵙崁後山群Gogan,大豹群Mngciq,馬里闊丸群Mqwang. mrhuw tgleng 領導者 Msbtunux- Maray Yuri/ Qara- Yumin Botu/ Tkasan-Syat/ Pehu Sbunaw- Yukan Bulung/ Pyaway- Maray Smyaq/ Gogan- Yawi Nokan, Yumin Yaway, Temu Qawin, Yukan Taru, Maray Temu/ Bngciq-Iyaw Syat/ Tranan- Maray Watan 'ringan zyaw 事件起因 ptringan squ zyaw "pnayang rgyax ru mzimu tayal" na 劉銘傳 qani. nway nha khangan rhzyal qalang Msbtunux ru Gogan. qolay ta kwara pinbahuw knus nha ma. yasa stpinriqan nha ita Tayal Gogan ki Msbtunux. 1886 kawas 劉銘傳 tmu hetay mzyup rhzyal qalang Tayal Msbtunux ki Gogan. ryaxqani kinrngu ta qmhut mhtuy, t'aring squ 2~3 byacing na " pintriqan Snazi", 3~6 byacing na " pintriqan Tkasan" , 9~11 byacing " pintriqan Pyaway", 1887 kawas 8~10 byacing na " pintriqan Topa", 1888 kawas 5~6 byacing " pintriqan Sbunaw", 1889 kawas 9 byacing ~ 1890 kawas 1 byacing na " pintriqan Gogan yatux" , 1891 kawas 9 byacing~ 1892 kawas 4 byacing na " pintriqan qnhut Msbtunux ki Gogan". ita qutux llyung pinhaban Tayal mhtuy hetay ayung Theluw. kwara pintriqan qani wal ta nya slaqux squ patas ru smwal sbalay Tayal. ana ga, ini nha baqi qmroq ita Tayal M'gaga squ hogan ru pklahang kinbhgan nqu qyunam rhzyal Tayal. ",3~6月"Tkasan之役",9月~11月" ",1889年9月~1890年1月"Gogan M'gaga . zyaw pcingan 事件後影響 kahul sqani lga wahan tqnga binah squliq. qolan ta na rhzyal hogan ru pyaran ta musa tkhut tmwang qalang rgyax. ( yan, ngungu kli, Sankyo, Goryo, Kiyay, Matuy rhzyal hogan qani wal nha qolan. tayal Bngciq mgyay tmwang lingay Yawhbun ru Silung). bsyaq mkbbaq binah ssquliq lga, pzyux qu pkalan ru pkatan uzi. skahul squ p'izyuw qqaya yasa sqyanux na saxa nha. maki qutux ke krryax ta sraral muci, " iyat t'gryung laqi squliq hiya. ke qani ga yasa balay nyux smyuk qnxan nasa. ,Bngciq .
S.PHON: == pintriqan ms~ɕβtunux ru ɣoɣan ***** == rjax pinlaħaŋ **** ************. kiʔan rħzjal . plaw mʦ~ʨiriq ms~ɕβtunux,******ɣoɣan,***mŋʦ~ʨiq,*****mqwaŋ. mrħuw tɣleŋ *** ms~ɕβtunux- maraj juri/ qara- jumin βotu/ tkas~ɕan-s~ɕjat/ peħu s~ɕβunaw- jukan βuluŋ/ pjawaj- maraj s~ɕmjaq/ ɣoɣan- jawi nokan, jumin jawaj, temu qawin, jukan taru, maraj temu/ βŋʦ~ʨiq-ijaw s~ɕjat/ tranan- maraj watan ʔriŋan zjaw **** ptriŋan s~ɕqu zjaw "pnajaŋ rɣjax ru mzimu tajal" na *** qani. nwaj nħa kħaŋan rħzjal qalaŋ ms~ɕβtunux ru ɣoɣan. qolaj ta kwara pinβaħuw knus~ɕ nħa ma. jas~ɕa s~ɕtpinriqan nħa ita tajal ɣoɣan ki ms~ɕβtunux. **** kawas~ɕ *** tmu ħetaj mzjup rħzjal qalaŋ tajal ms~ɕβtunux ki ɣoɣan. rjaxqani kinrŋu ta qmħut mħtuj, tʔariŋ s~ɕqu *~* βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na " pintriqan s~ɕnazi", *~* βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na " pintriqan tkas~ɕan" , *~** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ " pintriqan pjawaj", **** kawas~ɕ *~** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na " pintriqan topa", **** kawas~ɕ *~* βjaʦ~ʨiŋ " pintriqan s~ɕβunaw", **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ~ **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na " pintriqan ɣoɣan jatux" , **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ~ **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na " pintriqan qnħut ms~ɕβtunux ki ɣoɣan". ita qutux lljuŋ pinħaβan tajal mħtuj ħetaj ajuŋ tħeluw. kwara pintriqan qani wal ta nja s~ɕlaqux s~ɕqu patas~ɕ ru s~ɕmwal s~ɕβalaj tajal. ana ɣa, ini nħa βaqi qmroq ita tajal mʔɣaɣa s~ɕqu ħoɣan ru pklaħaŋ kinβħɣan nqu qjunam rħzjal tajal. ",*~**"tkas~ɕan**",**~***" ",*******~*******"ɣoɣan mʔɣaɣa . zjaw pʦ~ʨiŋan ***** kaħul s~ɕqani lɣa waħan tqŋa βinaħ s~ɕquliq. qolan ta na rħzjal ħoɣan ru pjaran ta mus~ɕa tkħut tmwaŋ qalaŋ rɣjax. ( jan, ŋuŋu kli, s~ɕankjo, ɣorjo, kijaj, matuj rħzjal ħoɣan qani wal nħa qolan. tajal βŋʦ~ʨiq mɣjaj tmwaŋ liŋaj jawħβun ru s~ɕiluŋ). βs~ɕjaq mkββaq βinaħ s~ɕs~ɕquliq lɣa, pzjux qu pkalan ru pkatan uzi. s~ɕkaħul s~ɕqu pʔizjuw qqaja jas~ɕa s~ɕqjanux na s~ɕaxa nħa. maki qutux ke krrjax ta s~ɕraral muʦ~ʨi, " ijat tʔɣrjuŋ laqi s~ɕquliq ħija. ke qani ɣa jas~ɕa βalaj njux s~ɕmjuk qnxan nas~ɕa. ,βŋʦ~ʨiq .
